comments.author: @BeyondNationsTV
comments.text: This documentary offers a fascinating look into the legacy of the Iron Curtain and how it shaped modern Russia. The political and cultural divisions of that era still influence perspectives today. It’s interesting to see how history continues to echo in the present.
